---
title: "CV"
---

## Snapshot

The PDF resume is available below, along with a short summary for quick review.

[Open CV PDF](../static/uploads/resume.pdf)

## Current Position

Research Staff, Samsung Electronics AI Center

### Research Interests

- Label-efficient learning
- Representation learning
- Semantic segmentation
- Object localization
- Semiconductor data intelligence
- Layout pattern generation

### Experience

- Research Staff, Samsung Electronics AI Center, Dec 2024 to present
- Research Staff, Samsung Electronics SAIT, Oct 2024 to Dec 2024
- Research Intern, NAVER Cloud, Jul 2023 to Dec 2023

### Education

- M.S. and Ph.D. in Integrated Technology, Yonsei University
- B.S. in Computer Science, Yonsei University

## Notes

This page is intentionally compact. The full printable version remains the PDF resume, while the homepage and research pages provide the broader narrative.
